tobbieIIv2.dance: Tobbie-II repeats the dance for for a certain number of times.
tobbieIIv2.dance|param|times: the amount of times to dance; eg. 5
tobbieIIv2.infraredValue: Read the value sensed by the right side of the infrared sensor.
tobbieIIv2.isObstacle: Determine if there are obstacles on the right side.
tobbieIIv2.isObstacle|param|sensitivity: This controls the threshold between a true and false
tobbieIIv2.rotate: Start rotating to the right or to the left
tobbieIIv2.rotateTime:
Start rotating to the right or to the left
@param [seconds=1.5] Time in seconds Tobbie should Rotate for
tobbieIIv2.shakeHead: Tobbie-II shakes his head for a certain number of times.
tobbieIIv2.shakeHead|param|times: the amount of times to shake the head; eg. 5
tobbieIIv2.stamp: Tobbie-II stamps his foot for a certain number of times.
tobbieIIv2.stamp|param|times: the amount of times to stamp; eg. 5
tobbieIIv2.walkTime: Make TobbieII for an amount of seconds.
tobbieIIv2.walkTime|param|seconds: The time in seconds Tobbie should walk for
